What We Offer

Everything your L&D team
needs to succeed.

From AI-personalized curricula to enterprise-grade reporting — Accredian delivers the full learning infrastructure, not just content.

AI-Powered Learning Paths

Adaptive curricula that adjust to each employee's role, pace, and skill gaps — delivering the right content at the right moment.

Personalization

Real-Time Analytics Dashboard

Full visibility into team progress, completion rates, skill acquisition, and ROI — in one unified command center.

Insights

Cohort-Based Learning

Structured group programs with live sessions, peer collaboration, and expert mentors — built for enterprise teams, not solo learners.

Collaboration

Globally Recognized Credentials

Certificates co-branded with IIT and top global universities — credentials that carry weight with employers and on resumes.

Certification

White-Label Platform

Deploy Accredian's full learning infrastructure under your own brand. Complete control over branding, domain, and user experience.

Enterprise

Dedicated Success Team

A named customer success manager, regular business reviews, and 24/7 support — because your investment deserves real partnership.

Support

Program Library

World-class programs,
built for teams.

Not generic e-learning. Structured, mentor-led programs with real projects, peer cohorts, and credentials that matter.

Data & AI

Data Science & Machine Learning

End-to-end data science program covering ML fundamentals to production deployment. Co-certified with IIT Guwahati.

Case Studies

Outcomes our clients
talk about.

From Fortune 500s to fast-growing startups — here's what enterprise learning looks like when it actually works.

We onboarded 400 engineers into our data stack in under 90 days. Accredian's cohort model meant nobody fell behind, and the completion rate was genuinely shocking.

RS

Ravi Shankar

VP of Engineering, Infosys

94% completion

across 400 learners

Other platforms give you a course catalog and wish you luck. Accredian gave us a customer success manager, custom program tracks, and a dashboard our CLO actually uses.

MI

Meera Iyer

Chief Learning Officer, Wipro

3x faster

skill validation cycles

The IIT-backed certification moved the needle for our teams. Employees are actively requesting to be enrolled — that never happened with our old LMS.

AK

Arjun Kapoor

Head of Talent, HCL Technologies

82 NPS

employee satisfaction score
